selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 人, 人类；a. 人类的, 似人类的, 人性的, 有同情心的
words.definition: a. characteristic of humanity

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 游戏, 游玩, 玩笑, 运动, 比赛, 赌博, 跳动, 表演, 剧本；v. 玩, 游戏, 假装, 开玩笑, 比赛, 扮演, 演奏, 演戏, 传摇曳, (使)跳动
words.definition: n. a dramatic work intended for performance by actors on a stage

words.translation: n. 网, 网状物, 罗网, 净利, 净价；a. 净的, 最终的
words.definition: n. a trap made of netting to catch fish or birds or insects

words.translation: n. 狗, 坏蛋；vt. 跟踪, 尾随
words.definition: n. a member of the genus Canis (probably descended from the common wolf) that has been domesticated by man since prehistoric times; occurs in many breeds

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 夜, 夜晚, 晚上, 黑暗, 夜晚的工作
words.definition: n. the time after sunset and before sunrise while it is dark outside

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: vt. 种植, 使长满；vi. 生长, 变成, 发展
words.definition: v. become larger, greater, or bigger; expand or gain

words.translation: n. 想法, 思想, 思维, 关心, 挂念；think的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: n. the organized beliefs of a period or group or individual

words.translation: prep. 在...之上, 迫近, 紧接着
words.definition: prep. On; -- used in all the senses of that word, with which it

words.translation: n. 褐色；a. 褐色的
words.definition: n. an orange of low brightness and saturation

words.translation: n. 捕捉, 陷阱, 捕捉之物, 抓, 拉手；vt. 捕捉, 赶上, 感染, 听清楚
words.definition: n. a drawback or difficulty that is not readily evident

words.translation: adv. 离去
words.definition: s. not present; having left

words.translation: n. 头, 头脑, 领袖, 脑袋, 最前的部分；vt. 为首, 朝向, 前进, 用头顶
words.definition: n. the upper part of the human body or the front part of the body in animals; contains the face and brains

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 白色, 洁白, 眼白, 白种人, 蛋白；a. 白色的, 纯洁的, 白种的, 苍白的, 空白的, 幸运的
words.definition: n. a member of the Caucasoid race

words.translation: 他是, 他有
n. 月亮, 月球, 月光；vi. 闲荡
words.definition: n. the natural satellite of the Earth

words.translation: n. 尾部, 后部, 辫子, 随员, 特务, 燕尾服, 踪迹, 限定继承(权)；a. 在后面的, 从后面而来的, 限定继承的, 尾部的, 后部的
words.definition: n. the posterior part of the body of a vertebrate especially when elongated and extending beyond the trunk or main part of the body

words.translation: n. 冬季, 萧条期, 衰退期；a. 冬天的
words.definition: n. the coldest season of the year; in the northern hemisphere it extends from the winter solstice to the vernal equinox

words.translation: n. 球, 舞会, 球状物；v. 捏成球形
words.definition: n. round object that is hit or thrown or kicked in games

words.translation: n. 床, 睡眠处, 河床, 底座, 路基, 一层；vt. 提供宿处, 栽种, 安装
words.definition: n. a piece of furniture that provides a place to sleep

words.translation: n. 鸟, 羽毛球；vi. 打鸟
words.definition: n. warm-blooded egg-laying vertebrates characterized by feathers and forelimbs modified as wings

words.translation: n. 春天, 弹簧, 跳跃, 弹性, 活力, 泉, 源泉；a. 春天的
words.definition: n. the season of growth

words.translation: n. 夏季, 全盛时期；vi. 避暑, 过夏天
words.definition: n. the warmest season of the year; in the northern hemisphere it extends from the summer solstice to the autumnal equinox

words.translation: n. 空气, 旋律, 态度；vt. 晾, 使通风, 夸耀
words.definition: n. a mixture of gases (especially oxygen) required for breathing; the stuff that the wind consists of

words.translation: n. 比赛, 玩耍, 比分, 得胜, 比赛规则, 策略, 游戏, 野味；vi. 赌博
words.definition: n. a contest with rules to determine a winner

words.translation: a. 红的, 红色的, 红肿的, 流血的；n. 红色, 红颜料, 赤字
words.definition: n. red color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of blood

words.translation: a. 确信, 必然的, 必定的；adv. 当然, 确实地, 无疑地
words.definition: s. physically secure or dependable

words.translation: n. 全部, 全体, 整体, 完全之体系；a. 所有的, 完整的, 完全的, 纯粹的
words.definition: n. all of something including all its component elements or parts

words.translation: v. 攀登, 上升, 爬；n. 攀登, 爬升
words.definition: n. an event that involves rising to a higher point (as in altitude or temperature or intensity etc.)

words.translation: n. 奶, 乳状物；vt. 挤乳, 榨取

words.translation: n. 狮子, 狮子(星)座, 国际狮子会会员
words.definition: n. large gregarious predatory feline of Africa and India having a tawny coat with a shaggy mane in the male

words.translation: n. 黑暗, 夜, 黄昏, 模糊；a. 黑暗的, 暗的, 深色的, 隐密的, 模糊的, 无知的
words.definition: n. absence of light or illumination

words.translation: v. 吃, 腐蚀
words.definition: v. take in solid food

words.translation: a. 平坦的, 单调的, 无力的, 浅的, 萧条的, 干脆的, 无聊的；adv. 平直地, 断然地
words.definition: n. a level tract of land

words.translation: a. 快乐的, 幸福的, 愉快的, 恰当的
words.definition: a. enjoying or showing or marked by joy or pleasure

words.translation: n. 跳跃, 跳动, 暴涨, 惊跳；vt. 跳跃, 跃过, 突升, 使跳跃
words.definition: n. a sudden and decisive increase

words.translation: a. 美好的, 和蔼的, 正派的, 做得好的, 精密的, 细微的, 挑剔的, 谨慎的
words.definition: n. a city in southeastern France on the Mediterranean; the leading resort on the French Riviera

words.translation: adv. 请；vt. 使高兴, 合...的心意, 取悦
words.definition: v. give pleasure to or be pleasing to

words.translation: a. 贫穷的, 贫乏的, 不幸的, 可怜的, 拙劣的, 卑鄙的
words.definition: a. having little money or few possessions

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: n. 骑马, 乘坐, 乘车, 搭便车；vt. 骑, 乘坐, 压迫, 控制
words.definition: n. a mechanical device that you ride for amusement or excitement

words.translation: n. 睡眠, 静止, 昏迷, 麻木, 长眠, 冬眠；vi. 睡觉, 睡眠, 静止
words.definition: n. a natural and periodic state of rest during which consciousness of the world is suspended

words.translation: n. 树, 木料, 树状物；vt. 把...赶上树

words.translation: a. 暖和的, 暖的, 温暖的, 热烈的, 兴奋的, 激烈的, 多情的, 色情的；vt. 使温暖, 弄热, 使兴奋, 使充满仇恨

words.translation: n. 穿着, 戴, 使用, 耗损, 服装, 耐久性；vt. 穿着, 戴, 留(须、发等), 呈现, 磨损, 磨成, 耗损, 使疲乏, 消磨
words.definition: n. impairment resulting from long use

words.translation: n. 咬, 一口；v. 咬, 刺痛, 穿透

words.translation: a. 金的, 含金的, 金色的, 贵重的, 繁盛的

words.translation: a. 坏的；n. 坏

words.translation: n. 黑色, 黑颜料；a. 黑色的

words.translation: n. 脸, 面容, 正面, 外观；vt. 面对, 朝, 正视, 面临

words.translation: vi. 失败, 缺乏, 中断, 衰退, 失灵；vt. 忘记, 使...失望, 缺乏, 不及格

words.translation: a. 外国的, 外交的, 外省的, 外来的, 不相关的；[机] 外来的

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的

words.translation: vt. 学习；认识到；得知

words.translation: vi. 坐, 就座, 坐落；vt. 使就座, 骑

words.definition: n. an urban area with a fixed boundary that is smaller than a city

words.translation: vt. 理解, 了解, 领会, 听说, 懂；vi. 懂得, 认为

words.translation: n. 乳酪
words.definition: n. a solid food prepared from the pressed curd of milk

words.translation: n. 母牛, 母兽；vt. 威胁

words.translation: n. 感冒, 寒冷；a. 寒冷的, 冷淡的, 冷静的

words.translation: a. 危险的

words.translation: a. 深的；adv. 深入地
words.definition: n. the central and most intense or profound part

words.translation: n. 责任, 关税, 职务, 尊敬

words.translation: vt. 享受, 喜欢, 欣赏
